Eclipse Scepter's Soul

Once in a while for 4 sec., every second, the unit removes 3 random negative effects from 2 random enemy units and deals pure damage to them equal to 20% of their max health, and additional pure damage equal to 50% of the scepter wielder's spell power.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
